name: Botanical Serum
description: A water-light leave-on serum built around rosemary leaf extract, ginger root, baicalin, and a Chlorella + Spirulina complex for hydration and follicular vitality. Engineered to be massaged into the scalp every morning, then forgotten.
howTo: Apply 6-8 drops to a clean, dry scalp.
Massage for 1-2 minutes along the part line and crown.
Do not rinse. Wait 1-2 hours before washing.
Use every morning. Patience is the active ingredient.

name: Peptide Serum
description: A higher-potency PM serum built on five biomimetic peptides (sh-Polypeptide-1, -9, -11; sh-Oligopeptide-2, -10) with saw palmetto and rosemary CO2. Engineered for the man addressing visible density change — applied to the part line three nights a week.
howTo: Apply 4-6 drops to a dry scalp before bed.
Massage gently along the part line and crown.
Do not rinse. Use Mon / Wed / Fri.
Allow 12 weeks for visible new growth at the part line.

name: Scalp Oil
description: A cold-pressed blend of jojoba, argan, castor, and almond oils with ginseng, peppermint, rosemary, and tea tree. Massaged into a dry scalp twenty minutes before shampoo, it loosens sebum casts, calms reactivity, and conditions the follicle in a way no rinse-off product can.
howTo: Apply one drop to each section of the scalp.
Leave 20 minutes, then shampoo as normal. Once weekly.
